mapper.select: /* wms-ubireport-ubireport-sql-oracle.xml - selectWaPkListPrintReportList */ SELECT PH.CTKEY /*센터 코드*/ , CT.CTNM /*센터명*/ , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PH.INSERTDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS INSERTDATE /*작업지시일시*/ , PH.PIHDKEY /*피킹 헤더 코드*/ , AR.ARKEY /*구역코드*/ , AR.ARNM /*구역명*/ , LC.LCKEY /*로케이션 코드*/ , IC.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , IC.ICNM /*상품명*/ , ICB.BARCODE AS BACODE /*바코드*/ , PD.UOM AS OB_UOM /*출고단위*/ , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(IVAT.EXPDATE, 1, 8), 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS EXPIREDATE /*유통기한*/ , PD.EXPCTQTY AS OB_EXQTY /* 지시수량(출고단위) */ , PD.CNFRMQTY AS OB_CFQTY /* 확정수량(출고단위) */ FROM TWORK_INFO_PI_HD PH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_PI_TOT_DT PD ON PH.CTKEY = PD.CTKEY AND PH.OWKEY = PD.OWKEY AND PH.PIHDKEY = PD.PIHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT CT ON PD.CTKEY = CT.CTKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_LC LC ON PD.CTKEY = LC.CTKEY AND PD.LCKEY = LC.LCKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_AR AR ON LC.CTKEY = AR.CTKEY AND LC.ARKEY = AR.ARKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON PD.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND PD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND PD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVAT IVAT ON IVAT.CTKEY = PD.CTKEY AND IVAT.OWKEY = PD.OWKEY AND IVAT.IVATKEY = PD.IVATKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICBARCODE ICB ON IC.CTKEY = ICB.CTKEY AND IC.OWKEY = ICB.OWKEY AND IC.ICKEY = ICB.ICKEY AND ICB.UOM = PD.UOM WHERE PH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND PH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND PH.PIHDKEY = #{pihdkey} AND PH.PKDIVCD = '20' /*20: 총량*/ ORDER BY PH.PIHDKEY , AR.ARKEY , LC.LCKEY , IC.ICKEY , IVAT.IVATKEY

/* wms-ubireport-ubireport-sql-oracle.xml - selectoWaveToteWorkOrderReportList */ SELECT OD.CTKEY , CT.CTNAME , OD.OWKEY , OW.OWNAME , OH.WAHDKEY , 'MSC' AS LCKEY --AL.LCKEY , AR.ARNAME , OD.ICKEY , IC.ICNAME , BACODE.BARCODE AS BACODE , OD.UOM , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(IVAT.EXPIREDATE, 1, 8), 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS EXPIREDATE , (CEIL(SUM(AL.ALQTY) / ICUT.ICUTQTY) * ICUT.ICUTQTY / ICUT2.ICUTQTY) AS ALQTY , CEIL(SUM(AL.ALQTY) / ICUT.ICUTQTY) AS ALQTY_UNIT , TH.INSERTDATE AS TA_INSERTDATE FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_AL_DT AL ON OD.CTKEY = AL.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = AL.OWKEY AND OD.OBHDKEY = AL.OBHDKEY AND OD.OBDTKEY = AL.OBDTKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_TA_HD TH ON AL.CTKEY = TH.CTKEY AND AL.OWKEY = TH.OWKEY AND AL.OUT_TA_HDKEY = TH.TA_HDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVAT IVAT ON AL.CTKEY = IVAT.CTKEY AND AL.OWKEY = IVAT.OWKEY AND AL.ICKEY = IVAT.ICKEY AND AL.IVATKEY = IVAT.IVATKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON OD.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUT ON IC.CTKEY = ICUT.CTKEY AND IC.OWKEY = ICUT.OWKEY AND IC.ICUTKEY = ICUT.ICUTKEY AND ICUT.ICUTTYPE = 'BOX' INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUT2 ON IC.CTKEY = ICUT2.CTKEY AND IC.OWKEY = ICUT2.OWKEY AND IC.ICUTKEY = ICUT2.ICUTKEY AND ICUT2.ICUTTYPE = OD.UOM INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_LC LC ON AL.CTKEY = LC.CTKEY AND AL.LCKEY = LC.LCKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_AR AR ON LC.CTKEY = AR.CTKEY AND LC.ARKEY = AR.ARKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT CT ON OD.CTKEY = CT.CTKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_OW OW ON OD.OWKEY = OW.OWKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICBACODE BACODE ON BACODE.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND BACODE.ICKEY = OD.ICKEY AND BACODE.UOM = 'BOX' LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INFO_PI_DT PD ON AL.CTKEY = PD.CTKEY AND AL.OWKEY = PD.OWKEY AND AL.OBHDKEY = PD.OBHDKEY AND AL.OBDTKEY = PD.OBDTKEY AND AL.ICKEY = PD.ICKEY AND AL.LCKEY = PD.LCKEY AND AL.IVATKEY = PD.IVATKEY AND AL.ULCKEY = PD.ULCKEY WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey} AND ( OD.UOM = 'BOL' OR IC.MSCSTORETYPE = 'TOTE' /* 출고단위가 BOL이거나 멀티셔틀보관방법이 TOTE인 상품 */ ) AND LC.LCSTORTYPE = '40' /* 할당된 로케이션이 ASRS스토리지인 것 */ GROUP BY OD.CTKEY , CT.CTNAME , OD.OWKEY , OW.OWNAME , OH.WAHDKEY , AL.LCKEY , AR.ARNAME , OD.ICKEY , IC.ICNAME , BACODE.BARCODE , OD.UOM , IVAT.EXPIREDATE , ICUT.ICUTQTY , ICUT2.ICUTQTY , TH.INSERTDATE
